revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-285

Platform attached to the land to permit passage of passengers and freight traffic to and from a ship. In some cases the outer end of the landing stage is floating on a pontoon.


Note: In German the term Anleger is also used for a landing stage.

{{IALAFooter}}
